title: Crispy Stir Fry
description: A vegan stir fry with a crispy twist, perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the Dutch-Style Carrot and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the Crispy Stir Fry Vegetables and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Vegan Stir Fry Sauce and 1 tablespoon of water.
Add the sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
